page.title: One Media — All Media. One Place.
page.description: Download public videos, images and audio from your favorite platforms with One Media.

hero.description: Download videos, images and audio from your favorite platforms. Save public reels, shorts and posts—all in one place.

errors.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid public http(s) URL.
errors.unsupportedUrl: This URL is unsupported or temporarily unavailable.
errors.privateContent: This content is private or requires login and cannot be downloaded.
errors.snapchatPrivate: This Snapchat content requires authorization and cannot be downloaded.
errors.snapchatUnsupported: This public Snapchat Spotlight URL is currently unsupported by the media extractor.
errors.backendUnavailable: The backend is unavailable. Start it and try again.
errors.network: A network error occurred. Please try again.
errors.downloadFailure: The download failed. Please try another URL or format.
errors.scanFirst: Scan a public URL before downloading.

platforms.title: Supported Platforms
platforms.description: Paste a public link and let One Media handle the rest.

footer.permissionDisclaimer: Download only content that you own or have permission to use.
footer.affiliationDisclaimer: One Media is an independent tool and is not affiliated with YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, Snapchat, X, Reddit, Threads, Pinterest or Vimeo.

queue.title: Download queue
queue.description: Track active downloads, progress, speed and remaining time.
queue.emptyDescription: Scanned media will appear here when you start a download.

history.title: Recent downloads
history.description: Your latest completed downloads, kept locally in this browser.
history.emptyDescription: Completed downloads will be saved here.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: One Media is designed to process public media links with minimal data collection.
privacy.collectedBody: We process the public URL you submit and technical request data needed to provide the service. We do not request account credentials.
privacy.cookiesBody: One Media does not use platform cookies, import browser sessions, or use cookies to bypass access controls. Theme and language preferences are stored locally in your browser.
privacy.filesBody: Downloaded media is stored temporarily while your request is completed, then removed after delivery or automatic expiry.
privacy.analyticsBody: The current application does not include third-party analytics. If analytics are introduced, this policy will be updated before collection begins.
privacy.securityBody: Private network addresses are blocked, public URLs are validated, and authentication-protected media is rejected.
privacy.retentionBody: Recent download history stays only in your browser and can be removed by you. Server-side job information is temporary and expires automatically.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: By using One Media, you agree to use the service responsibly and lawfully.
terms.responsibilityBody: You are responsible for the URLs and content you submit and for complying with applicable laws and platform terms.
terms.permissionBody: Download only content you own or content for which you have clear permission from the rights holder.
terms.prohibitedBody: Do not use One Media for illegal downloading, infringement, harassment, access-control bypassing, or abusive automated traffic.
terms.refusalBody: One Media may reject private content, unsupported links, excessive requests, or usage that threatens the service or others.
terms.availabilityBody: Platform changes can affect public media extraction. The service is provided without a guarantee that every public URL will remain supported.

copyright.title: Copyright Notice
copyright.intro: One Media respects creators and the rights attached to their work.
copyright.ownershipBody: Copyright and related rights remain with the original creators and rights holders. One Media does not claim ownership of downloaded media.
copyright.permissionBody: Only download content you created, own, or have explicit permission or a lawful right to use.
copyright.publicBody: One Media processes only URLs that are publicly accessible without login. Public availability does not remove copyright restrictions.
copyright.respectBody: Do not redistribute, publish, sell, or modify a creator's work unless your permission or applicable law allows it.

contact.title: Contact and Support
contact.intro: One Media is powered by Shexa Tech. Choose a support channel and our team will help you.
